author: y4rr
content: Probe finding (image 4 + 5): box coords from rust FasterRCNN body are systematically shifted right+down by 5-10 px vs torchvision; keypoint pixel diff = box drift + heatmap-decode drift. Root cause: ferrotorch_vision::ops::roi_align hardcodes aligned=true (offset=0.5), but torchvision detection models use roi_align(aligned=False, legacy mode: offset=0.0, roi_width.clamp(min=1)). All ROI align call sites (box head, mask head, keypoint head) need aligned=False to match pretrained weights.
